news.t: Shopping Will Take a Hit From the Iran War. Retail Stocks Are Already Paying the Price.
How To Avoid The Worst Sector ETFs 3Q23
Reopening plays still have room to run, market analysts say, as new ETFs launch

holdings.infoBox: BEDZ is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are Blackrock Treasury Trust Instl 62 stock at 8.29%, Chatham Lodging Trust at 6.95%, Sunstone Hotel Investors at 6.21%, Apple Hospitality REIT at 5.57%, and H World Group at 5.56%.

overview.description: The AdvisorShares Hotel ETF (BEDZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides exposure to US hotels, resorts, cruise lines and their sub-industries. BEDZ was launched on Apr 20, 2021 and is issued by AdvisorShares.

data.title: Reopening plays still have room to run, market analysts say, as new ETFs launch
data.text: With new hotel- and restaurant-based exchange-traded funds hitting the market, four analysts weigh in on the lasting power of the reopening trade.

data.title: ETF Edge: Hotel, dining ETFs launch as reopening trade continues
